scheme_name: RMEWF – Financial Assistance for Vocational Training of Widows of Ex-Servicemen
description: Provides one-time financial assistance to widows of Ex-Servicemen to undergo vocational training and settle independently.

benefits.financial_assistance: ₹20,000 (one-time aid after successful completion of training)

eligibility.beneficiary: Widow of Ex-Serviceman up to rank of Havildar

steps: Verification by Zila Sainik Welfare Officer
Forwarding to Kendriya Sainik Board for approval
